tests.name: 关键文件存在性检查
tests.detail: Checked 14 files, missing 0

tests.name: index.html script loading
tests.detail: Loaded 42 script files

tests.name: .page:not(.active) stacking fix
tests.detail: all-styles.css and transitions.css removed display:none duplicates; index.html uses opacity/visibility/pointer-events transition

tests.name: menu-toolbar::before pointer-events fix
tests.detail: Removed pointer-events:none, menu clicks not blocked by pseudo-element

tests.name: Button pseudo-element z-index fix
tests.detail: Button pseudo-element z-index is -1, placed below button content, won't intercept clicks

tests.name: PageManager noPointerPages fix
tests.detail: time-escape removed from noPointerPages, toolbar clickable

tests.name: StoryEngine conditional call fix
tests.detail: StoryEngine._renderChapterSelect() has conditional check, only called on story page navigation

tests.name: PageManager catch block fix
tests.detail: catch block includes console.error(e), errors won't be silently swallowed

tests.name: SW cache query param fix
tests.detail: fetch event strips query params for cache matching, index.html?v=51 requests correctly hit cache

tests.name: SW cache strategy fix
tests.detail: Changed to Cache First (Stale-While-Revalidate), returns cached response immediately when available

tests.name: SW status code check fix
tests.detail: Uses networkResponse.ok instead of status === 200, covers all 200-299 success codes

tests.name: SW cache write wait fix
tests.detail: cache.put() wrapped in event.waitUntil(), prevents write interruption

tests.name: MenuManager existence
tests.detail: menu-manager.js correctly defines MenuManager.toggleCategory() method

tests.name: ReportEngine storage function
tests.detail: report.js uses SafeStorage wrapper for localStorage, supports multi-source reading (GameState, aiTutorData, disasterGachaState, etc.)

tests.name: ReportEngine data source coverage
tests.detail: Supports reading from: GameState, aiTutorData, disasterGachaState, disaster_hq_* keys

tests.name: BlindBox engine function
tests.detail: game-engines.js contains BlindBoxEngine.open() method, supports normal/rare/epic/legendary/daily/boss blind boxes

tests.name: localStorage usage statistics
tests.detail: 18 files use localStorage, main files: ai-tutor-llm.js: 3 occurrences, ai-tutor.js: 3 occurrences, bg-themes.js: 3 occurrences, certification.js: 4 occurrences, encyclopedia_extra.js: 2 occurrences

tests.name: Page structure integrity
tests.detail: index.html contains 51 sub-page modules

tests.name: Back button coverage
tests.detail: 51 pages contain back-float return buttons

tests.name: Menu button configuration
tests.detail: Bottom toolbar has 9 buttons with onclick handlers

warnings: allEngines array has duplicate engine references: PrecisionEngine, TimeEscapeEngine. This is harmless but redundant.
Both transitions.css and index.html define .page rules — CSS specificity may cause unexpected behavior. index.html inline styles have higher priority.
conclusion: PASS: All critical fixes are active. No fatal issues found. Project should run normally.
